text_block_list.text:
One day, Biwa Hayahide and Narita Taishin are
training hard together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Phew... There, that makes three sets.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh, you been doing more reps or something?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No, I don't think so. It's the same as always...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The last time we worked out together, we only
ran three laps. Now you're asking to go for a
fourth. Pretty sure four's more than three.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. Your confusion must derive from my
description of this workout being "the same as
always."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Lately, my trainer and I have been customizing
workouts based on the condition of my body and
the track instead of depending on set numbers.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Since it's sunny and I feel great today, we
determined that increasing my reps by thirty
percent would more evenly distribute my
workload over the course of the week and—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, enough. I get it. You can stop now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're telling me your trainer has to put up with
this all the time?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't say there's any "putting up with" me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My trainer always takes the time to understand
what I'm saying and lets me know if something is a
good or bad idea.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I value our relationship... very much.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. Tell me about your little crush later. Let's get to work.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I-I do not have a crush! How dare you twist my
words when I was talking about something of
importance!

...It's true that Biwa Hayahide really has grown so
much. Even her friends are picking up on it!
